replics: Daria: Hello, young man. I saw your flying red car and thought you'd never reach me.
Artem: My name is Artem, I'm trying to understand what's going on and help people. Who are you?
Daria: Daria, a local craftswoman. Before all this dreariness, I created beauty for people. But now there's no color, no orders, and I can't reach anyone.
Artem: Yes, it's sad to be alone and without work. But maybe you could tell me something about what happened, because I don't understand anything.

Daria: Have you talked to anyone yet? Maybe Aglaya? She's my friend; we had a serious fight before the flooding, it was terrible. Friendship shouldn't end with one empty shell. I was wrong then, and I want to tell her so.
